citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:11am on May 21,
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the facility representatives by phone. Contact was made but the facility
representatives were not able to return to the facility in a reasonable amount of time to allow for an inspection.
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.38(b) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:11am on May 21, 
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the facility representatives by phone. Contact was made but the facility 
representatives were not able to return to the facility in a reasonable amount of time to allow for an inspection.  
 
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. 
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
